free_text: Rb and Cs isotopic cross sections from 40-60-MeV-proton
fission of U-238,Th-232 and U-235
The Grenoble isochronous cyclotron.
Analysis of odd-even effect.
.The on-line mass spectrometer.
The target material is evaporated in the form of a salt
onto a number of graphite strips.Targets consisted  of
1 to 3 mg/cm**2 of U-238,Th-232 and U-235.
Correction for distortion of the mass spectra using
measured diffusion curves;
Correction for the radioactive decay of the shortest-
lived isotopes during diffusion out of the target.
Uncertainty of the measurements within a
given isotopic distribution.
SD:Updated to new date formats,lower case.
Major corrections in all Subents. ERR-ANALYS moved to
Subent 001. ERR-S -> ERR-SYS. Subents 002-004; 006-008
were merged.
Normalization error at mass 86
In some cases it was not possible to measure the
independent yields of Rb at mass 87.  These values
have been interpolated or extrapolated from smooth
curves drawn through the data points. These values
were needed to allow integration of the total
distributions.
Tbl.1 from Phys.Rev. C5(1972)222
SD: SF3=X -> F; SF9=EXP deleted from
REACTION code. SF3=X -> F in MONITOR code.
ERR-ANALYS moved to Subent 001. ERR-S -> ERR-SYS. Data
from Subents 003,004 were added. Text in FLAG modified,
COMMENT deleted. MONITOR, MONIT-REF, MASS-NRM  added.
Normalization error at mass 86
Tbl.1 from Phys.Rev. C5(1972)222
SD: SF3=X -> F; SF9=EXP deleted from
REACTION code. SF3=X -> F in MONITOR code.
ERR-ANALYS moved to Subent 001. ERR-S -> ERR-SYS.
FLAG, COMMENT deleted. MONITOR, MONIT-REF, STATUS,
MASS-NRM  added.
All the U-235 cross sections have been corrected for
the fact that the U-235 targets contained 7% U-238.
In some cases it was not possible to measure the
independent yields of Rb at mass 87.  These values
have been interpolated or extrapolated from smooth
curves drawn through the data points. These values
were needed to allow integration of the total
distributions.
Tbl.1 from Phys.Rev. C5(1972)222
Normalized to give the same area as
the Rb distribution from 238U at 50 MeV.
SD: SF3=X -> F; SF9=EXP deleted from
REACTION code. ERR-ANALYS moved to Subent 001.
ERR-S -> ERR-SYS. Text in FLAG modified, COMMENT
deleted. STATUS added.
Values have been interpolated or extrapolated from
smooth curves drawn through the data points. These
values were needed to allow integration of the total
distributions. In some cases it was not possible to
measure the independent yields of Cs.
The over-all normalization errors.
The Cs normalizations at the different mass numbers
agreed within the expected errors
